jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Mamaearth
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mamaearth! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mamaearth:
Mamaearth is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth!
